summary: Iteration 55 - New Features Testing Complete. All 7 new features tested: User Name Change, Change PIN, Forgot PIN, Admin User Management (Ban/Unban, PIN Reset, Coin Adjust), WhatsApp Sharing Card, Enhanced Profile Page. Backend: 22/22 tests passed. Frontend: All modals and flows working correctly.

issues: FIXED: Forgot PIN button was being overlapped by 'Create Account' link. Added pb-16 padding and z-index to fix.

critical_code_review_comments: All new auth endpoints (forgot-pin, change-name, change-pin) working correctly
Admin user management endpoints (ban, adjust-coins, reset-pin) all functional
Profile page modals (EditNameModal, ChangePinModal, ShareCardModal) all open/close correctly
Forgot PIN flow has 2-step PIN entry with confirmation
Admin Users Tab has search, filter, and user detail view with action buttons
WhatsApp share card renders canvas with user stats correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 55 tested all 7 new features. Backend APIs: POST /api/auth/forgot-pin, PUT /api/auth/change-name, PUT /api/auth/change-pin, GET/POST /api/admin/users endpoints all working. Frontend: Profile page has 3 modals (EditNameModal, ChangePinModal, ShareCardModal), Admin Users Tab has PinResetModal and CoinAdjustModal. Forgot PIN flow in AuthFlow.jsx uses ForgotPinScreen component. Fixed minor UI overlap issue with Forgot PIN button on PinScreen.

admin_user_management.frontend: AdminUsersTab with search, filters, modals - PASSED
